ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "mol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "mol_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecule */,
  "mol_type" TEXT /* Type of the molecule (e.g., DTB, ADP) */,
  "mol_structure_file" TEXT /* File path or binary data of the molecular structure file */,
  "mol_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula */,
  "mol_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight */,
  "mol_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was created */,
  "mol_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the molecule was last modified */,
  "mol_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecules_mol_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("mol_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chain */,
  "mol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the chain belongs to */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the chain (e.g., A, B) */,
  "chain_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the chain was created */,
  "chain_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the chain was last modified */,
  "chain_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chains_mol_id FOREIGN KEY ("mol_id") REFERENCES molecules ("mol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chains_chain_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residues" (
  "res_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residue */,
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chain the residue belongs to */,
  "res_number" INTEGER /* Number of the residue */,
  "res_type" TEXT /* Type of the residue (e.g., DTB, ADP) */,
  "res_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the residue was created */,
  "res_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the residue was last modified */,
  "res_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the residue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("res_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_res_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("res_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("chain_id") REFERENCES chains ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atoms" (
  "atom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atom */,
  "res_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the atom belongs to */,
  "atom_name" TEXT /* Name of the atom (e.g., CS, N1, CN) */,
  "atom_type" TEXT /* Type of the atom (e.g., C, N, O) */,
  "atom_coordinates_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the atom */,
  "atom_coordinates_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the atom */,
  "atom_coordinates_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the atom */,
  "atom_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the atom was created */,
  "atom_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the atom was last modified */,
  "atom_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the atom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atoms_res_id FOREIGN KEY ("res_id") REFERENCES residues ("res_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atoms_atom_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonds" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond */,
  "atom1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first atom in the bond */,
  "atom2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second atom in the bond */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of the bond (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "bond_length" REAL /* Length of the bond */,
  "bond_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bond was created */,
  "bond_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the bond was last modified */,
  "bond_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_bond_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_atom1_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom1_id") REFERENCES atoms ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_atom2_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom2_id") REFERENCES atoms ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angles" (
  "angle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angle */,
  "bond1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first bond in the angle */,
  "bond2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second bond in the angle */,
  "angle_type" TEXT /* Type of the angle (e.g., observed, ideal) */,
  "angle_value" REAL /* Value of the angle */,
  "angle_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the angle was created */,
  "angle_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the angle was last modified */,
  "angle_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the angle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angles_angle_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("angle_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angles_bond1_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond1_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angles_bond2_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond2_id") REFERENCES bonds ("bond_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atom_types" (
  "atom_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atom type */,
  "atom_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the atom type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the atom type */,
  "atom_type_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the atom type was created */,
  "atom_type_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the atom type was last modified */,
  "atom_type_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the atom type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atom_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atom_types_atom_type_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom_type_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_types" (
  "bond_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond type */,
  "bond_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bond type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bond type */,
  "bond_type_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bond type was created */,
  "bond_type_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the bond type was last modified */,
  "bond_type_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bond type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_types_bond_type_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_type_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "angle_types" (
  "angle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angle type */,
  "angle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the angle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the angle type */,
  "angle_type_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the angle type was created */,
  "angle_type_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the angle type was last modified */,
  "angle_type_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the angle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_angle_types_angle_type_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("angle_type_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "user_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the user was last modified */,
  "user_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the molecular structure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecular structure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mol_id FOREIGN KEY ("mol_id") REFERENCES molecules ("mol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_mol_id FOREIGN KEY ("mol_id") REFERENCES molecules ("mol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
